feedback:
Subphase complete. All 9 Done Criteria are met:
1. ParleyApp is importable and runnable
2. Layout includes header, sidebar, chat area, input bar, footer
3. AgentSession is created from CLI args and config files, passed to ParleyApp
4. Agent events are subscribed to and dispatched
5. Streaming text is throttled to 30Hz
6. Input is disabled during streaming and re-enabled after
7. Print mode streams response and exits
8. Catppuccin theme is applied (themes/catppuccin.tcss)
9. Config is loaded from .tau/settings.json and ~/.tau/settings.json (with deep merge)

The previous evaluator feedback regarding missing config loading has been fully addressed:
- config.py created with load_config() reading project + user config files, deep-merged with defaults
- build_session() wired to config loading; CLI args override config values
- CLI --config argument accepted and stored in CLIArgs
- 272 total tests pass (116 subphase-specific + 156 other tau-coding-agent tests)
- Config tests cover: import, path helpers, defaults-only, project-only, user-only, merge order, corrupt files, save/load roundtrip, _deep_merge behavior, and build_session integration
